mapper.select:
select * from lab_open p inner join lab_sub l on p.lab_id = l.id where p.is_deleted = 0 and l.is_deleted = 0
and p.lab_id = #{labSubId}
and p.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and p.phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
order by p.update_time desc
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO lab_open (name, sex, phone, open_date, open_time, lab_id, create_at, create_time, update_at, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.sex}, #{item.phone}, #{item.openDate}, #{item.openTime}, #{item.labId}, #{item.createAt}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateAt}, #{item.updateTime})
